signals.title: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
signals.summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

signals.title: Trump vows to seize Iran’s Kharg Island
signals.summary: Kharg Island, the linchpin of Iran’s oil industry, has once more come under focus amid a fraying ceasefire.

signals.title: SpaceX shares rise nearly 20% in historic IPO
signals.summary:
SpaceX shares rose on the first day of trading as the company went public in a milestone event for both the company and the broader space industry. 
 The post  SpaceX shares rise nearly 20% in historic IPO  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Avanti trims GEO exposure with Hylas-3 sale
signals.summary:
TAMPA, Fla. — Avanti Communications is moving to close a chapter on the debt-fueled geostationary expansion that once defined the British satellite operator, with plans to sell the youngest payload […] 
 The post  Avanti trims GEO exposure with Hylas-3 sale  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Astronomers fear orbital data centers will interfere with observations
signals.summary:
As SpaceX gears up to start launching orbital data center spacecraft as soon as next year, astronomers warn those satellites could cause serious interference with their observations. 
 The post  Astronomers fear orbital data centers will interfere with observations  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Only 1 in 4 F-35s is fully mission capable, GAO finds
signals.summary: The F-35’s readiness rates continued to decline through fiscal 2025, with the fleet’s full mission capable rate falling to 25%, according to a GAO report.

signals.title: US Army commissions second cohort of tech executives into innovation unit
signals.summary: This week, the Army added three more technology executives to Detachment 201, a unit intended to bridge the gap between the commercial sector and military.

signals.title: Connecticut AG, agencies ask FERC to cut Eversource, Avangrid RTO adder
signals.summary: A new state law requires the utilities to participate in ISO New England, making them ineligible for an extra 0.5% return on equity, according to a complaint filed at the Federal Energy Regulatory Commission.

signals.title: 1M+ customers have connected solar to PG&E’s grid
signals.summary: Pacific Gas & Electric said the milestone comes during an industry shift from “a one‑way grid to an interactive system where customer energy resources are increasingly part of the solution.”

signals.title: Social Security COLA for 2027 may jump to 4.7%, one estimate finds. This chart shows prices driving the increase
signals.summary: As inflation climbs, Social Security beneficiaries may see a higher cost-of-living adjustment in 2027. Here's which costs spiked most over the past 12 months.

signals.title: Anthropic disables access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 to comply with government directive
signals.summary: Anthropic said it disabled access to its Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models to comply with an export control directive from the U.S. government.

signals.title: UAE denies 'false' reports of fund transfer to Iran
signals.summary: The statement follows a Reuters report that the UAE has agreed to unlock billions of dollars of frozen funds for Iran.

signals.title: SpaceX IPO sticks the landing. Here's what investors are saying about its epic first trading day
signals.summary: Despite a large retail allocation and huge volume, volatility was moderate

signals.title: Why TD Securities anticipates even bigger days ahead for SpaceX
signals.summary: Peter Haynes, TD Securities' head of index and market structure, suggests SpaceX's public debut is only a small part of the larger SpaceX timeline.

signals.title: Moats vs. moonshots: The Warren Buffett-Elon Musk style debate
signals.summary: In 2018, Warren Buffett and Elon Musk indirectly debated a key question that persists for modern investors.

signals.title: Drugmakers race to find a place in the next wave of obesity drugs
signals.summary: Drugmakers are betting they can crack into the obesity drug market that Novo Nordisk and Eli Lilly currently dominate.

signals.title: New student loan plan comes with higher bills for many. Tax planning can help cut your payments
signals.summary: With some planning, federal student loan borrowers can save on their monthly bills under the U.S. Department of Education's new repayment plan.

signals.title: Rivian CEO taking different approach than Elon Musk for humanoid robotics company
signals.summary: Rivian CEO RJ Scaringe started a robotics company late last year called Mind Robotics that he says has has raised more than $1 billion.

signals.title: This 28-year-old paid off her law school loans selling stickers and coloring books
signals.summary: Elyse Burns started selling her art on Etsy when she turned 18. Now she's paid off her student loans and did nearly $5 million last year.

signals.title: Former Tesla board member says SpaceX needs to achieve 2 of its 3 moonshots to keep its valuation
signals.summary: SpaceX has achieved its goal of becoming the largest IPO on record.

signals.title: Paramount-WBD merger wins approval from DOJ
signals.summary: The DOJ approval is an important milestone for the roughly $110 billion deal, though it could still face legal challenges from state attorneys general.

signals.title: Small investors scrambled to get in on the SpaceX IPO, even as some believe the valuation is 'stupid'
signals.summary: SpaceX set a fixed price of $135 per share in the leadup to its IPO on Friday, placing its valuation at $1.77 trillion. Shares rallied more than 25%.

signals.title: SpaceX market cap tops $2 trillion after shares of Elon Musk's rocket company gain 19% on debut
signals.summary: SpaceX shares soared on Friday as trading commenced on the Nasdaq.

signals.title: Top House Republican’s family investment poised to benefit from SpaceX IPO
signals.summary: Republican Rep. Lisa McClain’s husband bought up to $250,000 in Elon Musk’s xAI before it was folded into SpaceX ahead of its IPO.

signals.title: All in on AI at Astra
signals.summary:
Chris Kemp thinks he could be the last person left working at Astra — but not for the reason most people might think. His company rode the SPAC boom five […] 
 The post  All in on AI at Astra  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: H3 successfully returns to flight
signals.summary:
Japan’s H3 rocket launched June 11 on its first flight since a failure in December, placing six smallsats in orbit. 
 The post  H3 successfully returns to flight  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: In aerospace, AI isn’t replacing workers. It’s filling a shortage
signals.summary:
Aerospace executives see AI not as a replacement for workers but as a necessary tool for helping an overstretched industrial base 
 The post  In aerospace, AI isn’t replacing workers. It’s filling a shortage  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Understanding what’s next for orbital data centers
signals.summary:
This episode of Space Minds is from SpaceNews’ recent event on orbital data centers. There, SpaceNews journalists talk with industry leaders and analysts about what’s driving interest in the technology, […] 
 The post  Understanding what’s next for orbital data centers  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: ESA astronaut assignment on Artemis 3 part of negotiations on revised Artemis roles
signals.summary:
The assignment of an ESA astronaut to Artemis 3 is part of negotiations for revised roles in the overall effort, with a goal of getting its astronauts on the moon. 
 The post  ESA astronaut assignment on Artemis 3 part of negotiations on revised Artemis roles  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: HyImpulse signs letter of intent with Oman’s spaceport
signals.summary:
MILAN — Etlaq Spaceport, Oman’s commercial spaceport, and German-based small launch provider HyImpulse have signed a letter of intent to explore future launch-related activities and a potential operational presence in […] 
 The post  HyImpulse signs letter of intent with Oman’s spaceport  appeared first on  SpaceNews .

signals.title: Ukraine’s defense AI chief predicts ‘new paradigm’ of warfare
signals.summary: “The system that possesses more data and better understands that data, proposes solutions — that system will gain the advantage over the other."

signals.title: US plans major cut to jets, warships for NATO operations in Europe, NYT reports
signals.summary: The United States reportedly plans to significantly reduce the aircraft and warships it makes available for NATO operations in Europe.

signals.title: Humvee maker AM General to pitch unmanned ground vehicle at Eurosatory trade show
signals.summary: The Ukrainian military aims to contract 25,000 unmanned ground platforms in the first half of this year, more than doubling its 2025 total.

signals.title: Paris defense show may be last chance to buy before war, CEO says
signals.summary: Surging defense spending means Eurosatory is bigger than ever this year, with the number of exhibitors rising 30% to more than 2,600, per the organizer.

signals.title: For Warsh as Fed chair, silence may be the point
signals.summary: Kevin Warsh will hold his first Fed meeting, giving markets the first public look at how he'll communicate as chair of the Federal Reserve.

signals.title: Pirro's losses in Fed investigation should stay on the books, judge rules
signals.summary: In a scathing ruling, Judge James Boasberg denied U.S. Attorney for the District of Columbia Jeanine Pirro's request to vacate his earlier orders.
